title: Blaze & glaze
description: Blaze and Glaze is a fire-themed mod that upgrades the vanilla smelting system with powerful new furnaces and a smart fuel management tool — all wrapped in a glowing, aesthetic twist.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399d63269aedcb6ba3b3b0e883de5c8dae4b49c8.png) **Smelting with style – fast, functional, and fire-themed.**
📦 Click to view Blaze and glaze first version contents --- **📜 Description** > **Blaze and Glaze** is a fire-themed mod that upgrades the vanilla smelting system with powerful new furnaces and a smart fuel management tool — all wrapped in a glowing, aesthetic twist. > > Whether you want faster processing, automated fueling, or just a fiery vibe to your builds, this mod brings quality-of-life features with a touch of heat. --- **🔧 Current Features** 🔥 **Ash Furnace** ![Ash furnace off and on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/098b3ab0e75756f372cdcde303421923302596fc.jpeg) - A faster version of the vanilla furnace - Smelts items **12.5% faster** 🔥 **Blaze Furnace** ![Blaze furnace off and on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b98bad488f9dbbd2a83e5cceb9d7471109cff611.jpeg) - Enhanced furnace with **double input and output slots** - Perfect for bulk smelting 🔥 **Ancient Gold Furnace** ![Ancient gold furnace off and on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def0e57f3eee66250f6a4aecd597f9f7fc5b9170.jpeg) - Same features as the Blaze Furnace - Has a **chance to duplicate smelted items** in a balanced way 🛢️ **Fuel Pack** ![Fuel pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10e0525e743ff9237a8eb7bcac90f8867980a1f2.jpeg) - A smart device that **automatically supplies fuel** to nearby furnaces - Holds up to 7 fuel slots - Great for semi-automated setups 🔥**Alloyer** ![Alloyer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fceb5c1180f6578362b259ec3207002f598982f.jpeg) - A complete new way of getting resources by melting 3 items, as for now it only has one recipe but more are coming - Requires lava to work 🔥**New armors and Tools**
Blaze-Breeze Alloy set - Sword ![Spira Ignis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a8a42120d2bae6c70cabb8ad5e646daf3c23ffe.jpeg) - Pickaxe ![LavaCarver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8be76e83bf607df0ce00ff000c731349d3476a2.jpeg) - 3x3 Hammer ![moltenExcavator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58159070b78ae21a6fe7211ea376117dd4974b7a.jpeg) - Axe ![CinderCleaver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feb34ea73322c916053613384fcb09308ae49fd8.jpeg) - Shovel ![Ashling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f040844d6352bd20ba132c9f82932e52f17b628.jpeg) - Just an hoe :( ![Glaze Grounder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3605c6d628d397c221fdff30dec1067a889219e9.jpeg) - Armor set ![Emberwind Set Inv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bce06a35fcfd104a5ee97cc657169fa3fb4cc230.jpeg) ![Emberwind Set Worn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d55535de89df0f7110ca231c03f7f9e99c32cb24.jpeg)
---
--- **⚡ Update 1.1.0 – *The Shocking Update***
⚡ Click to expand the new features of v1.1.0 ### ⚔️ Lightning Khopesh A powerful weapon that summons **lightning bolts** on right-click, consumes **voltazite charges**. Electrify your enemies and look cool doing it. ### 🛡️ Volta Shield A block that projects a **force field** when placed. Consumes **redstone powder** to maintain power. Can be used defensively or decoratively. ### 🧲 Magnetic Glove A glove that manipulates metallic forces. Attracts nearby items to you ![Khopesh and glove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dfea4c61f25483d38007ef6754be3bc96f9bc0e.jpeg) WIP for more abilities in the future 👀 ### 🖼️ Custom Painting One new painting has been added to decorate your base with style and soul. ### 🧱 QoL Blocks New functional and decorative blocks added to help you build smarter and faster. ### ⚗️ Alloying Recipes New **Alloyer** recipes added, allowing you to combine **three vanilla items** into previously uncraftable materials (e.g. *dirt + bonemeal + grass = grass block*).
**✨ Planned Features** - Decorative blocks and light-emitting elements - more... --- **❓ FAQ – Blaze and Glaze** **Q: Is this mod compatible with other furnace mods?** A: It should work fine alongside most mods, but full compatibility depends on how other mods handle smelting. If you run into any issues, feel free to report them! --- **Q: How do I get Ancient Gold?** A: Try to enchant your pickaxe and you will see 😉 --- **Q: How does the Fuel Pack work?** A: Place the Fuel Pack near your furnaces (within 5 blocks away). It will automatically distribute fuel from its internal 7-slot inventory to nearby furnaces that need it. No redstone needed, no fuss! --- **Q: How does the Ancient Gold Furnace duplication work?** A: It has a **balanced chance** to duplicate the result of a smelted item. It’s not guaranteed — think of it as a fiery little bonus when luck is on your side. --- **Q: Can I customize the mod’s behavior?** A: Yup! Blaze and Glaze comes with a **fully customizable config file**. You can tweak furnace speeds, duplication chances, fuel pack range, and more — all in one cozy little place. Make it as spicy (or chill) as you want. --- **Q: Can I use Blaze and Glaze in a modpack?** A: **Yes!** Feel free to include it in public or private modpacks. A shoutout is appreciated but not required. --- **Q: Will there be more content in future updates?** A: Definitely. Planned features include fire-themed weapons, armor, glazed decorative blocks, and even more smelting-related tools. --- **Q: Is there a Fabric version?** A: Not for now — but if enough people ask for it, who knows? --- **Q: Where can I report bugs or suggest features?** A: You can leave a comment on the mod page or reach out via the official Discord (still WIP): [https://discord.gg/bHsMPrgWRy](https://discord.gg/bHsMPrgWRy) --- **🔁 Current Translations** - English - Italian (I am Italian) - French - Spanish - Russian --- **🎨 Credits** - Textures: me - Models: me - Coding: me - Translations: ChatGPT im a lonley man :( As a wise man once said: _la-la-la-lava, ch-ch-ch-chicken, Steve's furnace mod yeah, hot as hell._
